---
id: pre-check
title: "Run pre-trade checks"
description: "Validates a prospective deal against credit limit, currency exposure, and custom Python rules. Returns HTTP 200 if all checks pass, HTTP 422 if any check fails. The deal is NOT created."
sidebar_label: "Run pre-trade checks"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Run pre-trade checks"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/deals/pre-check"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Validates a prospective deal against credit limit, currency exposure, and custom Python rules. Returns HTTP 200 if all checks pass, HTTP 422 if any check fails. The deal is NOT created.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

>
